items.title: Chanel, Gucci, and now Louis Vuitton exit Seoul duty-free stores
items.summary: Louis Vuitton announced it will close its three remaining Seoul duty-free counters (Lotte Myeongdong, Shilla Seoul, Shinsegae Myeongdong), joining Chanel (2021) and Gucci/Hermes (2023), which withdrew earlier. The piece frames this as a multi-year luxury exodus from Korean duty-free tied to the collapse of group-tour and Chinese reseller traffic, with duty-free sales down from 24.86 trillion won (2019) to 12.53 trillion won (2024); city stores fell from 84% to 73% of total revenue.

items.title: Gucci Beauty launches autumn 2026 floral-pattern cosmetics and fragrance
items.summary: Japanese fashion trade outlet Fashion Press covered Gucci Beauty's autumn 2026 lineup for the Japan market, including a 10-shade floral-pattern eyeshadow palette, a matching lip color, and a creamy, transparent floral fragrance, continuing the brand's regular seasonal beauty release cadence.

items.title: Fan post: Stray Kids' Lee Know spotted in Gucci washed-denim shirt and authenticated bag
items.summary: A Korean fan account posted photos documenting Stray Kids member Lee Know (Gucci global brand ambassador) wearing a Gucci washed cotton denim shirt and carrying a Gucci bag, part of ongoing organic fan amplification of Gucci ambassador sightings within the Korean K-pop fandom on X.
